results.rendered_html:
vātala (von 1. vāta)
1〉 adj. (f. ā) = vātula  H. an. 3,683 . windig; luftig; den Wind (als humor) befördernd; zu demselben disponirt  SUŚR. 1,53,3 . 76,9 . 173,8 . 177,17 . 187,5 . 197,17 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 306,b,11 . [Page6-0910] yoni Bez. eines best. Defects der weiblichen Geschlechtstheile  WISE 380 .  SUŚR. 2,396,19 .  ŚĀRṄG. SAṂH. 1,7,102 .
— 2〉 m. Kichererbse  ŚABDAC. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— Vgl. a˚.

vātala a. (lī f.) [vātaṃ rogamedaṃ lāti lā-ka]
1 Stormy, windy.
2
(pb) Flatulent.
— laḥ
1 Wind.
2 The chickpea (caṇaka).
